ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrolment_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of student enrolment */,
  "enrolment_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's enrolment (e.g., All Good, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "google_cloud_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the student's Google Cloud Skills Boost profile */,
  "quests_completed" INTEGER /* Number of quests completed by the student */,
  "skill_badges_completed" INTEGER /* Number of skill badges completed by the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the institution */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the institution */,
  "number_of_instructors" INTEGER /* Number of instructors currently employed by the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution offering the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Completed, Dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or final assessment of the student in the course */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason if the student drops out of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "quest_description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the quest belongs to */,
  "quest_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the quest */,
  "quest_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the quest in minutes */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill badge */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the skill badge belongs to */,
  "badge_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for earning the skill badge */,
  "badge_type" TEXT /* Type of badge (e.g., certification, achievement) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_badges_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_quests" (
  "student_quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student quest record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who completed the quest */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of quest completion */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the student for the quest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quest completion (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Failed) */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the student to complete the quest */,
  "retry_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any retries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_quests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_quests_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_badges" (
  "student_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student badge record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who earned the badge */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill badge earned */,
  "awarded_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was awarded */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the student for the badge */,
  "badge_type" TEXT /* Type of badge (e.g., certification, achievement) */,
  "badge_status" TEXT /* Status of the badge (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_badges_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES skill_badges ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the instructor belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor teaches in */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the instructor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the instructor's assignment to the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the instructor's assignment to the course */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., primary, co-instructor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, complete quest) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
